era_context: Mid-second millennium BCE, New Kingdom Egypt, Hittite Empire, Shang Dynasty China, Vedic period South Asia. This year falls within a broadly stable period of the ancient world, though specific events are not recorded.
disconfirming_evidence: No events are attested for 1948 BCE. The year is not documented in any surviving source.
historiographic_note: 1948 BCE is not marked by any known historical event in surviving records. The year falls within the reign of Thutmose III in Egypt and the Shang Dynasty in China, but no specific events for this year are recorded. For practical purposes, this year is historically invisible.
